title: asclepias puberula
intro: Asclepias puberula, also known as pubescent milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, containing compounds such as cardenolides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Asclepias puberula include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
